webservice.description: Deployment traceability endpoint — returns semantic version, git sha, env, and build metadata for the running service
webservice.auth: None — public endpoint (no Bearer token required)

outputs.sha: string — git commit sha of deployed build

guarantees: Always has a 'version' field with non-empty string
Always has a 'sha' field — matches the deployed git commit
Response time < 2s (no DB or LLM in path)

frontend_dependencies: web/js/solace.js → version badge fetches /api/v1/version on page load
web/software5.html → version badge in bottom-right corner
evidence_notes: Northstar contract for deployment traceability. Elisabeth Hendrickson: trace code → deployed artifact. sha field is the chain of custody.
